variables.description: Participant did not know his race

variables.name: Race_Other
variables.description: Participant identified with other race not listed

variables.name: Race_Other_Text
variables.description: Description of participant's self-reported race

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Deidentified Subject's ID

variables.name: TANNER
variables.description: Self-Staging Tanner Staging (stages 1 - 5)

variables.name: USBORN
variables.description: Participant was born in the United States

variables.name: AVGPAIN
variables.description: Number (1 - 10) best describing participant's average pain or discomfort on the days that they had pain/discomfort - over the last week (1=No pain; 10=Most severe pain experienced)

variables.name: BLADDER
variables.description: How often participant has had a sensation of not emptying his bladder completely after finishing urinating, over the last week?

variables.name: DISCHARG
variables.description: Participant experienced discharge from the penis (drip) in the last week

variables.name: EJACULAT
variables.description: Participant has had pain or discomfort during or after sexual climax (ejaculation or cumming) in the last week

variables.name: GLANS
variables.description: Participant has had pain or discomfort in tip of the penis (not related to urination) in the last week

variables.name: PEEBURN
variables.description: Participant has had pain or burning during urination in the last week

variables.name: PEELESS
variables.description: How often participant has had to urinate again less than two hours after finishing urinating, over the last week

variables.name: PERINEUM
variables.description: Participant has had pain or discomfort in area between rectum and testicles in the last week

variables.name: PUBIC
variables.description: Participant has had pain or discomfort below the waist, in pubic or bladder area in the last week

variables.name: RASH
variables.description: Participant experienced a rash or sore on his penis, testicles or groin arena

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Deidentified Subject's ID

variables.name: SWELL
variables.description: Participant experienced swelling in his testicles

variables.name: SXLIMIT
variables.description: How much participant's symptoms have kept him from doing the kinds of things he would usually do, over the last week

variables.name: SXQOL
variables.description: How participant would feel if he were to spend the rest of his life with his symptoms just the way they have been during the last week

variables.name: SXTHINK
variables.description: How much participant thought about his symptoms, over the last week

variables.name: TESTICLE
variables.description: Participant has had pain or discomfort in testicles in the last week

variables.name: TID
variables.description: Data collection time point ID (measured in months from baseline)

variables.name: CT
variables.description: Results of chlamydia NAAT

variables.name: GC
variables.description: Results of gonorrhea NAAT

variables.name: TV
variables.description: Results of trichomonas NAAT

variables.description: Number of leukocytes in urine specimen

variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC
